name: Strawberries Romanoff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 quarts fresh strawberries, cleaned and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the strawberries with sugar and Cointreau.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Allow the ice cream to defrost slightly by placing it in the bottom part of the refrigerator instead of the freezer.
4. Whip the heavy cream until stiff.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the vanilla ice cream using a wooden spoon.
6. Fold in the whipped cream, lemon juice, and remaining Cointreau into the ice cream mixture.
7. Blend until smooth.
8. Pour the prepared mixture over the chilled strawberries.
9. Serve immediately.
